What we offer

Material aesthetics, structural engineering, and aligned global supply.

Root & Route combines the feeling of an atelier with the discipline of a production partner.

01

Material Innovation

Selected sustainable art papers, specialty finishes, and tactile materials curated for brand expression.

02

Structural Engineering

Opening resistance, magnetic snap, drawer movement, and full unboxing experience design.

03

Global Supply Alignment

B2B communication, production standards, conscious sourcing, certification support, and delivery coordination.

The collaborative journey

From root story to finished route.

A clear custom packaging process designed for international B2B communication and grounded production standards.

01

Discovery & Briefing

We define the product, audience, shelf context, quantity, timing, and brand story beneath the brief.

02

Tactile Concepts & Structural Design

We translate your story into material mood, opening behavior, architecture, and unboxing rhythm.

03

Prototyping & Material Selection

Samples refine paper, finish, color, closure, texture, and performance before production.

04

Artisan Production & Logistics

We align factory craft, quality standards, international communication, and global delivery.
